goal: Add read-only selected-file preview inspection, source-follow preview choices, session-selection state, layered value display, and fixture-only write-target candidate foundations without enabling real layered writes.
stagesImplemented: session config selection state with disabled UI scaffold
read-only layered current value model and detail-page display

selectedFilePreviewInspection.unreadableBehavior: Shows friendly copy that the file could not be read for preview and no changes were made.

sourceFollowPreviewBehavior.reviewAllConnectedFiles: Preview graph follows source/include files read-only.
sourceFollowPreviewBehavior.onlyThisFile: Preview graph uses SourceFollowPolicy::OnlyRoot and says connected files are not included.
sourceFollowPreviewBehavior.cancel: Clears manual preview and hides the preview panel.

sessionConfigSelectionMode.uiBehavior: Use for this session (planned) is visible but disabled.
sessionConfigSelectionMode.sessionOnlyState: ConfigSelectionLifecycle::SessionReadOnly can represent a read-only session selection.

layeredCurrentValueDisplay.ui: Detail pane shows a read-only note and occurrence lines when a setting appears in more than one connected file.
layeredCurrentValueDisplay.structuredFalsePositivePolicy: Structured records are ignored and do not become scalar layered values.

fixtureWriteTargetModel.generatedOrScriptManagedPolicy: Flagged as not safe and requiring advanced confirmation in the fixture model.

uiChanges: Selected preview now includes read-only inspection summary.
Review all connected files and Only this file update only the preview summary.
Cancel and Clear selected file remove the preview.
Session-only use is represented as disabled/planned UI.
Setting details can show read-only layered value occurrences.

validation.gitStatusShort: passed; only current sprint files plus pre-existing untracked local audit/design artifacts were present before commit

proofUsed: src/ui/window.rs read-only preview and layered display
fixture tests for source-follow, session state, layered values, and write-target candidates
proofStillMissing: Real manual config selection persistence remains unimplemented.
Full session reread from selected config remains deferred.
nextRecommendedSprint: Implement a read-only selected-config session reread preview that rebuilds current-value projections in an isolated preview model without affecting Apply, persistence, or real write targets.
